services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Transform your living spaces with professional interior painting services that bring new life to every room in your home.

services.title: Exterior Painting

services.title: Drywall Repair
services.description: Expert drywall repair services to fix holes, cracks, and damage, preparing surfaces for flawless painting results.

about.heading: Serving Richmond with Pride
about.body: E.C. Painting / Drywall Repair brings professional painting and repair services to homeowners throughout Richmond and surrounding areas. We're committed to delivering quality workmanship that enhances your home's beauty and value. From single rooms to complete home makeovers, we handle every project with care and attention to detail.

reviews.name: Sarah Mitchell
reviews.text: E.C. Painting transformed our living room and kitchen. The crew was professional, punctual, and left everything spotless. The drywall repair work was seamless - you can't even tell where the old holes were. Highly recommend for quality work at fair prices.

reviews.name: Mike Rodriguez
reviews.text: Had E.C. Painting handle both interior painting and some drywall repair after a small water leak. They matched the existing texture perfectly and the paint job looks fantastic. Great communication throughout the project.

reviews.name: Jennifer Park
reviews.text: Used E.C. Painting for our home office renovation. They repaired several nail holes and cracks in the walls before painting. The attention to detail was impressive and the final result exceeded our expectations.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: We Serve Richmond & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting services throughout the greater Richmond area

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Home?
cta.body: Contact E.C. Painting / Drywall Repair today for your free estimate and discover the difference professional service makes.
